channel.title: Space Force News (sample)
channel.description: Sample spaceforce.mil feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: Space Force fields AI-enabled space domain awareness tool
item.description: Guardians began using a machine learning tool to track objects and assess threats in orbit.

item.title: Guardians test autonomous satellite maneuvering algorithms
item.description: The Space Force evaluated autonomous collision-avoidance algorithms during an on-orbit demonstration.

item.title: Space Force holds change of command ceremony
item.description: A delta welcomed its new commander during a traditional ceremony.
